query:
SELECT 
  g.id AS group_id,
  g.name AS group_name,
  g.code AS group_code,
  cc.name AS cost_center_name,
  g.minute_cost,
  COUNT(w.id) AS worker_count,
  GROUP_CONCAT(w.full_name SEPARATOR ', ') AS workers
FROM `groups` g
LEFT JOIN cost_centers cc ON g.cost_center_id = cc.id
LEFT JOIN workers w ON w.group_id = g.id
WHERE g.code IN ('PROD-001', 'MAINT-001', 'SERV-001')
GROUP BY g.id, g.name, g.code, cc.name, g.minute_cost
ORDER BY g.id;
